entry.title: Didem Soydan’ın transparan kıyafeti büyüledi!

link.title: Didem Soydan’ın transparan kıyafeti büyüledi!

entry.content: Didem Soydan, bir derginin kapak çekimi sırasında giydiği transparak kıyafetle adeta büyüledi. Çekim enasında sık sık kıyafetini düzelten cesur model, frikik vermemek için oldukça çabaladı. Çekim videosunu Instagram’dan paylaşan Soydan, takipçilerinden beğeni topladı.
entry.summary: Didem Soydan, bir derginin kapak çekimi sırasında giydiği transparak kıyafetle adeta büyüledi. Çekim enasında sık sık kıyafetini düzelten cesur model, frikik vermemek için oldukça çabaladı. Çekim videosunu Instagram’dan paylaşan Soydan, takipçilerinden beğeni topladı.

entry.title: The Voice Kids

link.title: The Voice Kids

entry.content:
Divertissement
2020
Synopsis :
Pour la première fois, un ancien talent passe de l’autre côté côté du fauteuil : Kendji Girac, gagnant de la saison 3 de " The Voice ", endosse le costume de coach. A ses côtés, trois coachs historiques de " The Voice Kids " : Jenifer, Soprano et Patrick Fiori. Pour ce premier épisode, place aux premières auditions à l’aveugle.
En savoir plus :
L’actualité de la télévision :
Le programme TV :
Plus de bandes annonces sur
Retrouvez Télérama sur :
Facebook :
Instagram :
Twitter :
Youtube :

A ses côtés, trois coachs historiques de " The Voice Kids " : Jenifer, Soprano et Patrick Fiori. Pour ce premier épisode, place aux premières auditions à l’aveugle. entry.title: Cara Merawat dan Mencuci Baju Mahal Rancangan Desainer

link.title: Cara Merawat dan Mencuci Baju Mahal Rancangan Desainer

entry.content:
Kampanye sustainable fashion kembali menggema, bahkan dijadikan tema khusus di ajang fesyen ternama di Indonesia, Muslimah Fashion Festival (Muffest) 2020.
Tapi, tahukah Anda kalau sustainable fashion bukan sekadar bahan dan cara pembuatan baju yang ramah lingkungan. Sustainable fashion juga mencakup pada cara mencuci busana yang harus benar.
Artikel Selengkapnya:
#DesainerBaju #Fashion #SustainableFashion
Video Editor: Yulita Futty Hapsari
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Kampanye sustainable fashion kembali menggema, bahkan dijadikan tema khusus di ajang fesyen ternama di Indonesia, Muslimah Fashion Festival (Muffest) 2020. Tapi, tahukah Anda kalau sustainable fashion bukan sekadar bahan dan cara pembuatan baju yang ramah lingkungan. Sustainable fashion juga mencakup pada cara mencuci busana yang harus benar. Artikel Selengkapnya: #DesainerBaju #Fashion #SustainableFashion Video Editor: Yulita Futty Hapsari ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Zahid on backdoor plot: It’s just speculation

link.title: Zahid on backdoor plot: It’s just speculation

entry.content: Umno president Datuk Seri Dr Ahmad Zahid Hamidi told the press on Thursday that reports of a back-door government was just speculative. He also said that the support shown by several Umno lawmakers for the leadership of Prime Minister Tun Dr Mahathir Mohamad did not mean the stand of Umno.
entry.summary: Umno president Datuk Seri Dr Ahmad Zahid Hamidi told the press on Thursday that reports of a back-door government was just speculative. He also said that the support shown by several Umno lawmakers for the leadership of Prime Minister Tun Dr Mahathir Mohamad did not mean the stand of Umno.

entry.title: The new Porsche 911 Targa 4 in Dolomite Silver Driving Video

link.title: The new Porsche 911 Targa 4 in Dolomite Silver Driving Video

entry.content:
Porsche completes its sports car trio in time for summer: following on from the Coupé and Cabriolet, the third body variant of the new 911 generation now makes its debut with the all-wheel drive 911 Targa 4 and 911 Targa 4S models. The distinguishing feature of the Targa remains its innovative, fully automatic roof system and, just like the legendary original Targa model from 1965, it features a characteristic wide roll hoop, a movable roof section above the front seats and a wraparound rear window. The roof can be comfortably opened and closed in just 19 seconds.
It is powered by a six-cylinder, three-litre boxer engine with twin turbochargers: the 911 Targa 4 now delivers 283 kW (385 PS) and, in combination with the optional Sport Chrono package, accelerates from zero to 100 km/h in just 4.2 seconds – one tenth faster than before. The engine in the 911 Targa 4S boasts 331 kW (450 PS) and reaches the 100 km/h mark in just 3.6 seconds under the same conditions – four tenths faster than its predecessor. Top speed of the 911 Targa 4 is 289 km/h (up two km/h), while the 4S peaks at 304 km/h (up three km/h).
entry.summary: Porsche completes its sports car trio in time for summer: following on from the Coupé and Cabriolet, the third body variant of the new 911 generation now makes its debut with the all-wheel drive 911 Targa 4 and 911 Targa 4S models. The distinguishing feature of the Targa remains its innovative, fully automatic roof system and, just like the legendary original Targa model from 1965, it features a characteristic wide roll hoop, a movable roof section above the front seats and a wraparound rear window. The roof can be comfortably opened and closed in just 19 seconds. It is powered by a six-cylinder, three-litre boxer engine with twin turbochargers: the 911 Targa 4 now delivers 283 kW (385 PS) and, in combination with the optional Sport Chrono package, accelerates from zero to 100 km/h in just 4.2 seconds – one tenth faster than before. The engine in the 911 Targa 4S boasts 331 kW (450 PS) and reaches the 100 km/h mark in just 3.6 seconds under the same conditions – four tenths faster than its predecessor. Top speed of the 911 Targa 4 is 289 km/h (up two km/h), while the 4S peaks at 304 km/h (up three km/h).

entry.title: Die Spielanalyse SV Tapfer 06 Leipzig - SG Taucha 99 (Testspiel)

link.title: Die Spielanalyse SV Tapfer 06 Leipzig - SG Taucha 99 (Testspiel)

entry.content:
ALLE VIDEOS IMMER 48 STD. VOR DAILYMOTION SEHEN
❗ ➡ ❗
"Die Spieler sind froh ihrer Leidenschaft wieder nachgehen zu können"
Steffen Hartmann (Trainer SV Tapfer 06 Leipzig) war mit der Leistung seiner Mannschaft gegen die SG Taucha 99 sehr zufrieden. Es sei eine klare Steigerung von Spiel zu Spiel erkennbar. Körperlich müssen seine Jungs bis zum Saisonstart am 05.09.2020 noch zulegen. Positiv findet er, dass endlich wieder Fußballspiele stattfinden können. Für seine Mannschaft sei es besonders wichtig, wieder spielen und ihrem Hobby nach gehen zu können.
Testspiel (25.07.20)
Die Spielanalyse mit Steffen Hartmann (Trainer SV Tapfer 06 Leipzig)
⚽ #WODASLEBENFUSSBALLSPIELT
Homepage:
Instagram:
Facebook:
YouTube:
Twitter:
Bearbeitet mit: VEGAS Pro 16 //
Gelb, gut, günstig! -10% Rabatt auf ALLE Mietungen und Buchungen bei unserem Partner STARCAR - Autovermietung // CODE: KickTV //

VOR DAILYMOTION SEHEN ❗ ➡ ❗ "Die Spieler sind froh ihrer Leidenschaft wieder nachgehen zu können" Steffen Hartmann (Trainer SV Tapfer 06 Leipzig) war mit der Leistung seiner Mannschaft gegen die SG Taucha 99 sehr zufrieden. Es sei eine klare Steigerung von Spiel zu Spiel erkennbar. Körperlich müssen seine Jungs bis zum Saisonstart am 05.09.2020 noch zulegen. Positiv findet er, dass endlich wieder Fußballspiele stattfinden können. Für seine Mannschaft sei es besonders wichtig, wieder spielen und ihrem Hobby nach gehen zu können. Testspiel (25.07.20) Die Spielanalyse mit Steffen Hartmann (Trainer SV Tapfer 06 Leipzig) ⚽ #WODASLEBENFUSSBALLSPIELT Homepage: Instagram: Facebook: YouTube: Twitter: Bearbeitet mit: VEGAS Pro 16 // Gelb, gut, günstig! -10% Rabatt auf ALLE Mietungen und Buchungen bei unserem Partner STARCAR - Autovermietung // CODE: KickTV //

entry.title: La Sieste acoustique : JP Nataf ‘Le Radeau’

link.title: La Sieste acoustique : JP Nataf ‘Le Radeau’

entry.content:
Le 21 juin dernier, Bastien Lallemant présentait une sieste acoustique à la Maison de la Radio, accompagné de JP Nataf, Albin de la Simone, Babx, le duo Rosemary Standley & Dom La Nena (Birds On a Wire) ✨.
Prise de son : Cédric Chatelus & Antoine Hespel
Réalisation : Jean-Michel Després
entry.summary: Le 21 juin dernier, Bastien Lallemant présentait une sieste acoustique à la Maison de la Radio, accompagné de JP Nataf, Albin de la Simone, Babx, le duo Rosemary Standley & Dom La Nena (Birds On a Wire) ✨. Prise de son : Cédric Chatelus & Antoine Hespel Réalisation : Jean-Michel Després

entry.title: Kacau, Polisi Bali Tilang Turis Jepang, Peras Rp 1 Juta

link.title: Kacau, Polisi Bali Tilang Turis Jepang, Peras Rp 1 Juta

entry.content:
Aksi anggota polisi di Jembrana, Bali mendadak viral karena diduga melakukan aksi pungutan liar.
Link Terkait:
Turis asing itu melakukan pelanggaran yakni tidak menghidupkan lampu kendaraan. Lalu oknum polisi meminta uang sebesar Rp 1 juta kepada seorang turis tersebut. Kapolres Jembrana AKBP Ketut Gede Adi Wibawa mengakui jika anggota polisi yang viral itu adalah anak buahnya. Dia pun mengklaim sedang memeriksa anggota polisi itu untuk mendalami kapan dan di mana perisitiwa itu terjadi. Dia mengaku tak membenarkan aksi palak yang dilakukan anak buahnya itu. Dia pun berjanji akan memberikan sanksi tegas jika anggota polisi itu terbukti melakukan pelanggaran.
#PolisiBali #WNJepang #Palak
Video Editor: Andika Bagus
=================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Aksi anggota polisi di Jembrana, Bali mendadak viral karena diduga melakukan aksi pungutan liar. Link Terkait: Turis asing itu melakukan pelanggaran yakni tidak menghidupkan lampu kendaraan. Lalu oknum polisi meminta uang sebesar Rp 1 juta kepada seorang turis tersebut. Kapolres Jembrana AKBP Ketut Gede Adi Wibawa mengakui jika anggota polisi yang viral itu adalah anak buahnya. Dia pun mengklaim sedang memeriksa anggota polisi itu untuk mendalami kapan dan di mana perisitiwa itu terjadi. Dia mengaku tak membenarkan aksi palak yang dilakukan anak buahnya itu. Dia pun berjanji akan memberikan sanksi tegas jika anggota polisi itu terbukti melakukan pelanggaran. #PolisiBali #WNJepang #Palak Video Editor: Andika Bagus ================================= Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 50 Teaser ARY Digital Drama

link.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 50 Teaser ARY Digital Drama

entry.content:
Mera Dil Mera Dushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law.
#AlizehShah #YasirNawaz #MeraDilMeraDushman
Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama)
Written By: Mirza Asim Baig
Cast:
Yasir Nawaz
Alizey Shah
Noman Sami
Laiba Khan
Amna Malik
Salman Saeed
Shazia Gohar
Anam Tanveer
Naveed Raza
Akbar Islam
Gul E Rana
Fareeda Shabir
Fatima Sohail
Saba Shah
Malik Raza
Asiya Irshad
New Timings :
Watch Mera Dil Mera Dushman Monday Tuesday & Wednesday at 9:00 Pm only on ARY Digital
entry.summary: Mera Dil Mera Dushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law. #AlizehShah #YasirNawaz #MeraDilMeraDushman Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama) Written By: Mirza Asim Baig Cast: Yasir Nawaz Alizey Shah Noman Sami Laiba Khan Amna Malik Salman Saeed Shazia Gohar Anam Tanveer Naveed Raza Akbar Islam Gul E Rana Fareeda Shabir Fatima Sohail Saba Shah Malik Raza Asiya Irshad New Timings : Watch Mera Dil Mera Dushman Monday Tuesday & Wednesday at 9:00 Pm only on ARY Digital

entry.title: Pinay Drag Queen Is Also A Math Tutor Online

link.title: Pinay Drag Queen Is Also A Math Tutor Online

entry.content: Kyne is a Pinay drag queen based in Canada. She started to love Mathematics in high school and according to her, she always sees the “beauty and elegance” of the subject. Underneath the drag, Kyne sees herself as a nerdy person.
entry.summary: Kyne is a Pinay drag queen based in Canada. She started to love Mathematics in high school and according to her, she always sees the “beauty and elegance” of the subject. Underneath the drag, Kyne sees herself as a nerdy person.

entry.title: Scot Gov - Stick With It - 60 sec video PORTRAIT

link.title: Scot Gov - Stick With It - 60 sec video PORTRAIT

entry.content:
The Scottish Government has teamed up with star of Still Game, Gavin Mitchell aka Boaby the Barman in a new video urging people in Scotland to stick with the FACTS guidelines to keep everyone safe.
The five golden rules of the FACTS campaign are: Face coverings, Avoid crowded places, Clean hands and surfaces regularly, Two metre distance from others or 1 metre when in a 1 metre hospitality zone and Self-isolate and book a test if you’re showing any symptoms.
entry.summary: The Scottish Government has teamed up with star of Still Game, Gavin Mitchell aka Boaby the Barman in a new video urging people in Scotland to stick with the FACTS guidelines to keep everyone safe. The five golden rules of the FACTS campaign are: Face coverings, Avoid crowded places, Clean hands and surfaces regularly, Two metre distance from others or 1 metre when in a 1 metre hospitality zone and Self-isolate and book a test if you’re showing any symptoms.

entry.title: 2021 Subaru Crosstrek Limited Driving Video

link.title: 2021 Subaru Crosstrek Limited Driving Video

entry.content:
The 2021 Crosstrek Sport and Crosstrek Limited come standard with the 2.5-liter SUBARU BOXER engine that produces 182 hp and 176 lb.-ft. of torque and is paired with a Lineartronic® CVT (continuously variable transmission). This combination allows the Sport and Limited trim levels to achieve an EPA-estimated fuel economy of 27 city / 34 highway / 29 combined MPG.
The 2021 Crosstrek Base and Premium trims continue to use the efficient 2.0-liter 4-cylinder BOXER engine that delivers 152-hp and 145 lb.-ft. of torque. Base and Premium are offered with either a standard 6-speed manual transmission or optional Lineartronic CVT. The CVT models achieve EPA-estimated fuel economy of 28 city / 33 highway / 30 combined MPG. The 6-speed manual models are rated at 22 city / 29 highway / 25 combined MPG.
entry.summary: The 2021 Crosstrek Sport and Crosstrek Limited come standard with the 2.5-liter SUBARU BOXER engine that produces 182 hp and 176 lb.-ft. of torque and is paired with a Lineartronic® CVT (continuously variable transmission). This combination allows the Sport and Limited trim levels to achieve an EPA-estimated fuel economy of 27 city / 34 highway / 29 combined MPG. The 2021 Crosstrek Base and Premium trims continue to use the efficient 2.0-liter 4-cylinder BOXER engine that delivers 152-hp and 145 lb.-ft. of torque. Base and Premium are offered with either a standard 6-speed manual transmission or optional Lineartronic CVT. The CVT models achieve EPA-estimated fuel economy of 28 city / 33 highway / 30 combined MPG. The 6-speed manual models are rated at 22 city / 29 highway / 25 combined MPG.

entry.title: Man and Woman Fall While He Tries Spinning her Around his Neck

link.title: Man and Woman Fall While He Tries Spinning her Around his Neck

entry.content: These acrobats attempted a trick that involved spinning the woman around the man by hooking her elbow around his neck. After one successful spin, they lost their balance and fell to the ground. Luckily, there were no injuries.
entry.summary: These acrobats attempted a trick that involved spinning the woman around the man by hooking her elbow around his neck. After one successful spin, they lost their balance and fell to the ground. Luckily, there were no injuries.

entry.title: Madhya Pradesh: बेटे को परीक्षा दिलाने पिता ने चलाई 105 KM Cycle, UP के IPS भावुक वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Madhya Pradesh: बेटे को परीक्षा दिलाने पिता ने चलाई 105 KM Cycle, UP के IPS भावुक वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Son in Dhar district of Madhya Pradesh 105 km to take the exam IPS Navneet Sikhera became emotional after seeing the story of his father riding a bicycle to the examination center. He shared a post titled ‘Father’ on his Facebook account, remembering his days of struggle. Recalling his studies, IPS Sikra told how his father took him on a bicycle to get IIT exams and how his father Navneet Sikra with his words, when he was uncomfortable seeing material things.
मध्य प्रदेश के धार में एक मजदूर पिता अपने बेटे साइकल पर बैठाकर परीक्षा दिलाने ले गया। इस दौरान उसने 105 किलोमीटर साइकल चलाई। पिता के इस संघर्ष को देखकर उत्तर प्रदेश के आईपीएस नवनीत सिकेरा भावुक हो गए। उन्होंने अपने फेसबुक पर भावुक पोस्ट लिखी और अपने संघर्ष के दिनों को याद किया। नवनीत सिकेरा ने फेसबुक पर वह तस्वीर पोस्ट की जिसमें पिता साइकल चला रहा है। पिता के पीछे उनका बेटा पीठकर बैग लादकर बैठा है। पिता ने 105 किलोमीटर साइकल चलाकर बेटे को परीक्षा केंद्र तक पहुंचाया।
#MadhyaPradesh #NavnietSekera #FatherSonCycle #OneindiaHindi
entry.summary: Son in Dhar district of Madhya Pradesh 105 km to take the exam IPS Navneet Sikhera became emotional after seeing the story of his father riding a bicycle to the examination center. He shared a post titled ‘Father’ on his Facebook account, remembering his days of struggle. Recalling his studies, IPS Sikra told how his father took him on a bicycle to get IIT exams and how his father Navneet Sikra with his words, when he was uncomfortable seeing material things. मध्य प्रदेश के धार में एक मजदूर पिता अपने बेटे साइकल पर बैठाकर परीक्षा दिलाने ले गया। इस दौरान उसने 105 किलोमीटर साइकल चलाई। पिता के इस संघर्ष को देखकर उत्तर प्रदेश के आईपीएस नवनीत सिकेरा भावुक हो गए। उन्होंने अपने फेसबुक पर भावुक पोस्ट लिखी और अपने संघर्ष के दिनों को याद किया। नवनीत सिकेरा ने फेसबुक पर वह तस्वीर पोस्ट की जिसमें पिता साइकल चला रहा है। पिता के पीछे उनका बेटा पीठकर बैग लादकर बैठा है। पिता ने 105 किलोमीटर साइकल चलाकर बेटे को परीक्षा केंद्र तक पहुंचाया। #MadhyaPradesh #NavnietSekera #FatherSonCycle #OneindiaHindi

entry.title: Jammu Kashmir : Baramulla में आतंकी हमला, एक पुलिस अफसर और दो जवान शहीद वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Jammu Kashmir : Baramulla में आतंकी हमला, एक पुलिस अफसर और दो जवान शहीद वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Terrorist attacks on security forces continue in Jammu and Kashmir CRPF Naka Party was attacked by terrorists in Kreiri area of Baramulla district on Monday. A special police officer and two CRPF personnel were martyred in this terror attack. Gone .. The terrorists escaped after the attack. At present, the entire area has been cordoned off and search operation is being conducted.
जम्मू-कश्मीर में सुरक्षाबलों पर आतंकी हमले लगातार जारी हैं…. सोमवार को बारामुला जिले के क्रेइरी इलाके में सीआरपीएफ नाका पार्टी पर आतंकियों ने हमला कर दिया… इस आतंकी हमले में एक स्पेशल पुलिस अफसर और सीआरपीएफ के दो जवान शहीद हो गए ..हमले के बाद आतंकी भाग निकले…फिलहाल पूरे इलाके को घेर लिया गया है और सर्च ऑपरेशन चलाया जा रहा है
#JammuKashmir #Baramulla
entry.summary: Terrorist attacks on security forces continue in Jammu and Kashmir CRPF Naka Party was attacked by terrorists in Kreiri area of Baramulla district on Monday. A special police officer and two CRPF personnel were martyred in this terror attack. Gone .. The terrorists escaped after the attack. At present, the entire area has been cordoned off and search operation is being conducted. जम्मू-कश्मीर में सुरक्षाबलों पर आतंकी हमले लगातार जारी हैं…. सोमवार को बारामुला जिले के क्रेइरी इलाके में सीआरपीएफ नाका पार्टी पर आतंकियों ने हमला कर दिया… इस आतंकी हमले में एक स्पेशल पुलिस अफसर और सीआरपीएफ के दो जवान शहीद हो गए ..हमले के बाद आतंकी भाग निकले…फिलहाल पूरे इलाके को घेर लिया गया है और सर्च ऑपरेशन चलाया जा रहा है #JammuKashmir #Baramulla

entry.title: Study: Super-Spreaders Are Contributing To ‘Explosions’ Of COVID-19 Transmission

link.title: Study: Super-Spreaders Are Contributing To ‘Explosions’ Of COVID-19 Transmission

entry.content:
A new study highlights the astonishing role played by ‘super-spreaders’ in the novel coronavirus COVID-19 pandemic.
Super-spreading is a phenomenon in which certain individuals disproportionately infect a large number of people.
Several super-spreader events have been recorded across the country since the start of the pandemic.
According to UPI, roughly 20% of all COVID-19 infections in Georgia during the early stages of the outbreak were directly linked with 2% of the cases.
The researchers say the findings indicate that super-spreading of the virus was widespread in the state, particularly in rural areas.
Super-spreading can contribute to explosions of transmission, even when we are seeing the numbers of new cases declining. Asst. Prof. Max Lau Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University
entry.summary: A new study highlights the astonishing role played by ‘super-spreaders’ in the novel coronavirus COVID-19 pandemic. Super-spreading is a phenomenon in which certain individuals disproportionately infect a large number of people. Several super-spreader events have been recorded across the country since the start of the pandemic. According to UPI, roughly 20% of all COVID-19 infections in Georgia during the early stages of the outbreak were directly linked with 2% of the cases. The researchers say the findings indicate that super-spreading of the virus was widespread in the state, particularly in rural areas. Super-spreading can contribute to explosions of transmission, even when we are seeing the numbers of new cases declining. Asst. Prof. Max Lau Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University
